events.reasoning: Acknowledging game over
Starting IRONCLAD A0
Starting the run - talking to Neow to see our blessing options

Neow options: (0) Choose a card, (1) 1HP enemies x3, (2) Lose 99g for a rare card, (3) Lose Burning Blood for random boss relic. Option 2 (lose gold for rare) is strong - rare cards like Reaper/Immolate can define a run. Gold is replaceable, rare cards from rewards are not guaranteed. Going with option 2.

Taking the Elite fight for a relic drop. At 63/80 HP with potions available. Deck has Reaper, Offering, Clothesline, Iron Wave, Headbutt, Bash - well equipped for any Act 1 elite.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Gremlin Nob. FIGHT TYPE: Elite (kill speed priority). WIN CONDITION: All attacks, zero Skills after turn 1. Nob Bellows turn 1 (free). Offering safe on turn 1 since Enrage not active yet. After that, only play Attacks. KEY CARDS: Offering (turn 1 only), Bash (Vuln setup), Clothesline (12 dmg + Weak), Headbutt (9 dmg). POTION PLAN: Essence of Steel for passive block since I cannot play Defend. Swift Potion for extra draws. RISKS: Getting bad hands with all Defends after turn 1.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Lagavulin. FIGHT TYPE: Elite (kill speed priority). WIN CONDITION: Wake with Bash+ immediately, burst during stun and Siphon Soul turns. Kill before Str debuffs stack. ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Stun turn + Siphon Soul turns are free. Block on attack turns. KEY CARDS: Bash+ (Vuln), Offering (energy+draws), Headbutt (top-deck Bash+), Clothesline (Weak). POTION PLAN: Swift Potion for extra draws if needed. RISKS: Siphon Soul reducing Str/Dex makes fight harder if it goes long.

KEY CARDS: Bash+ (Vuln), Offering (energy+draws), Headbutt (top-deck Bash+), Clothesline (Weak). POTION PLAN: Swift Potion for extra draws if needed. RISKS: Siphon Soul reducing Str/Dex makes fight harder if it goes long.

FIGHT STRATEGY - The Guardian. FIGHT TYPE: Boss (spend HP freely to kill faster). WIN CONDITION: Whittle down 240 HP over 12-14 turns. Trigger Mode Shift with burst to cancel attacks. KEY TURNS: Block on Fierce Bash (32), damage on Charging Up and Vent Steam (free). POTIONS: Fear Potion for Vuln, Elixir for exhaust recovery. Fairy for death insurance. DO NOT over-exhaust: Reaper, Offering, Shockwave, Feed all exhaust.

events.label: The Guardian Strategy
events.reasoning: FIGHT STRATEGY - The Guardian. FIGHT TYPE: Boss (spend HP freely to kill faster). WIN CONDITION: Whittle down 240 HP over 12-14 turns. Trigger Mode Shift with burst to cancel attacks. KEY TURNS: Block on Fierce Bash (32), damage on Charging Up and Vent Steam (free). POTIONS: Fear Potion for Vuln, Elixir for exhaust recovery. Fairy for death insurance. DO NOT over-exhaust: Reaper, Offering, Shockwave, Feed all exhaust.
Fear Potion applies 3 Vulnerable to Guardian. Amplifies all damage by 50% for 3 turns.

events.command: play Thunderclap; play Strike 0; play Iron Wave 0; play Feed 0; end
events.translated: Thunderclap → Strike → The Guardian → Iron Wave → The Guardian → Feed → The Guardian → End Turn
events.reasoning: Burst 37 damage to trigger Mode Shift (30 threshold) on free turn. Skips Fierce Bash (32 damage)! Thunderclap(6+Vuln) + Strike(9) + Iron Wave(7) + Feed(15) = 37 with Vuln. Feed exhaust is acceptable - boss fight, no more hallway kills for Max HP.

Burst for Mode Shift. Clothesline deals 18 with Vuln. Need 40 total this turn to trigger Mode Shift and cancel Whirlwind.
Turn 4: Cleave + Headbutt to trigger Mode Shift (22+12+13=47 > 40). Defend for 5 block. Take 12-5=7 damage. Guardian enters defensive mode.
